what_it_does: This file is a minimal YAML-frontmatter ledger record that links a channel-memory attachment to a board item target.
observations: id att-e3ecdfd8 matches the filename stem
no body or payload follows the frontmatter
conventions: id field matches the attachment filename
board:// URI scheme for cross-system target references
concerns: File contains only metadata; no title, body, or explanatory payload
The referenced board item is not present or described in this file
No author or provenance information is recorded
notes: A bare pointer record that ties a dragnet-development channel attachment to a specific board item by URI.
questions: What content or action does board item item-a3dde6c1 represent?

purpose_vs_actual: The file acts as a metadata pointer/attachment record, which matches what its frontmatter fields imply; it does not claim to contain the referenced board item itself.
intention_signals: It appears to be trying to create a durable, timestamped association between a channel-memory attachment and a board item in the dragnet-development channel.
novelty: The board:// URI scheme and the board_items attachment_type suggest a lightweight, URI-based bridge between channel memory and board artifacts.
contribution: Provides a stable, timestamped link between a channel-memory attachment and a board item, supporting traceability from channel artifacts to board records without embedding the target content.
summary_for_embedding: A YAML-frontmatter channel-memory attachment record named att-e3ecdfd8 in the dragnet-development channel of type board_items pointing to board://item-a3dde6c1 with an added timestamp.
intention_for_embedding: To record that a channel-memory attachment in dragnet-development is associated with board item item-a3dde6c1.
